name: Assembly Sequence Runner
description: Execute a multi-step assembly sequence defined as a JSON plan. Each step specifies a sub-skill to invoke, its inputs, and pass/fail conditions. Produces a structured execution log. Supports sequential and conditional branching.

inputs.name: skill_api_url
inputs.description: NWO Skill Engine API URL for sub-skill invocation

inputs.name: caller_agent_id
inputs.description: Agent ID passed to sub-skill executions

outputs.name: execution_log
outputs.description: Per-step log: {step, skill_id, status, outputs, error, duration_ms}

outputs.name: failed_step
outputs.description: Name of first failed step (null if all passed)
